changes.title: 新增
items: `unity_run_states` 新增 Unity 运行时 Profiler 辅助能力，支持指标采样、尖峰记录、Profiler 帧导出、CSV 输出和 JSON 摘要。
新增内置 Profiler Skill：`skill/builtin/profiler.md`。
Chat 的 Unity 状态弹层新增启动当前 Unity 项目的操作，并显示启动中、等待连接状态。
Markdown 引用、资产 chip、文件树和 Git 变更列表新增 Unity 资产类型图标。
Unity Inspector Diff 新增紧凑的 Vector 与 Quaternion 展示，并支持 Euler / Quaternion 切换。
显示设置新增“层级视图用彩色图标显示修改状态”。

changes.title: 修复
items: 文件变更默认使用树视图，并在 staged / commit detail 树中显示 Locus 管理目录标记。
取消对话时会保留已流式输出的部分回复和 thinking 内容。
Knowledge 工具现在明确区分 `.md` 文档路径和目录路径。
内置 Skill 可从 `skill/builtin/` 正确发现和读取，并兼容旧的 app skill 选择。
Knowledge 统计和元信息改为显示项目文档与 App 内置文档来源。
主界面默认主题改为深色。
Roslyn bundle 构建改为隔离输出目录，并清理临时 ILRepack 产物。
NSIS 更新会清理旧版本遗留的根级内置 Skill 文件。

changes.title: 移除
items: Knowledge catalog 和工具返回结构移除旧的 `scope` 字段。
内置 Skill 移除根级文件路径，统一迁移到 `skill/builtin/`。

changes.title: Added
items: Added Unity runtime profiler helpers for `unity_run_states`, including metric sampling, spike capture, profiler frame export, CSV output, and JSON summaries.
Added a built-in profiler skill at `skill/builtin/profiler.md`.
Added Unity project launch from the chat Unity status popover, with launching and waiting-for-connection states.
Added Unity asset-aware icons for Markdown references, asset chips, file trees, and Git change lists.
Added compact vector and quaternion display in Unity inspector diffs, including Euler/Quaternion switching.
Added a display setting for merging Git tree status into colored file icons.

changes.title: Fixed
items: File changes now default to tree view and show Locus-managed folder badges in staging and commit detail trees.
Cancelled assistant runs preserve interrupted streamed text and thinking content when a partial response exists.
Knowledge tools now require `.md` suffixes for document paths and directory paths for directory operations.
Built-in skills now resolve correctly from nested `skill/builtin/` paths, including legacy app skill selections.
Knowledge catalog storage source labels now separate project and app built-in documents.
The main app theme now defaults to dark.
Roslyn bundle generation now writes through an isolated output directory and cleans transient ILRepack artifacts.
NSIS updates clean legacy root-level built-in skill files after the built-in skill move.

changes.title: Removed
items: Removed the legacy `scope` field from knowledge catalog indexing and tool-facing document metadata.
Removed root-level bundled skill file paths in favor of `skill/builtin/`.
